message:
chore(persona): remove unused expandPromptVars wrapper

Delete the unexported expandPromptVars function which was a simple
wrapper around ExpandPromptVarsWithContext(content, p, nil). This
function was never called anywhere in the codebase - all callers
use ExpandPromptVarsWithContext directly.

Reducing dead code helps maintain codebase clarity and prevents
confusion about which functions to use.
